info.name: 03 - Admin Management
info.description: Admin-only management APIs for departments, categories, priorities, and SLA rules.

request.description: Purpose: admin list departments. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin create department. Required token: admin_token. Saves department_id.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.data && json.data.department) { pm.environment.set('department_id', json.data.department.id); }

request.description: Purpose: admin show department. Required token: admin_token. Required variable: department_id.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin update department. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin soft delete department. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin list categories. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin create category. Required token: admin_token. Requires department_id. Saves category_id.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.data && json.data.category) { pm.environment.set('category_id', json.data.category.id); }

request.description: Purpose: admin show category. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin update category. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin soft delete category. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin list priorities. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin create priority. Required token: admin_token. Saves priority_id.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.data && json.data.priority) { pm.environment.set('priority_id', json.data.priority.id); }

request.description: Purpose: admin show priority. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin update priority. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin soft delete priority. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin list SLA rules. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin create SLA rule. Required token: admin_token. Requires priority_id; department_id/category_id are optional.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.data && json.data.sla_rule) { pm.environment.set('sla_rule_id', json.data.sla_rule.id); }

request.description: Purpose: admin show SLA rule. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin update SLA rule. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: admin soft delete SLA rule. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

item.name: Admin - Complaints
item.description: Admin complaint listing, viewing, assignment, department/category correction, priority updates, and status updates. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token.

request.description: Purpose: list every complaint with filters and pagination. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Optional filters: status, department_id, category_id, priority_id, assigned_employee_id, citizen_id, is_sla_breached, date_from, date_to, search, per_page.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: show one complaint with citizen, department, category, priority, assigned employee, attachments, timeline, and assignments. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Required variable: complaint_id.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: assign or reassign complaint to an employee. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Employee department must match complaint department. Expected response includes assigned_employee.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

const json = pm.response.json(); pm.test('assigned employee exists', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('assigned_employee'); }); if (json.data && json.data.id) { pm.environment.set('complaint_id', json.data.id); } if (json.data && json.data.assigned_employee) { pm.environment.set('assigned_employee_id', json.data.assigned_employee.id); }

request.description: Purpose: correct complaint department/category. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. If category_id is supplied, it must belong to department_id. Clears assigned employee when department mismatches.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: change complaint priority and recalculate due_at when an SLA rule matches. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: update complaint status using lifecycle rules. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Example transition requires current status submitted.

exec: pm.test('status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: negative lifecycle test. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Expected response: 422 when transition is not allowed from the current complaint status.

exec: pm.test('status is 422', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(422); });
